abilities.name: Beneath the Leaves
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

abilities.name: Fade into the Hills
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" suffers damage from an enemy attack, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place that model within 4". Then, the placed model gains a Hidden token.

actions.name: Gifted Gun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)12". The target gains an Exposed token.

triggers.name: Among the Willows
triggers.text: Choose a marker within 3" of the target. Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)1" of the chosen marker, then remove the chosen marker.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Caught in Quicksand
triggers.text: Target gains a Staggered token and moves 2", unaffected by severe terrain.

actions.name: Into Action
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other ally only. Place the target within 3" of its current location, then it gains a Badge token.

triggers.name: Recruit
triggers.text: A different ally within range gains a Badge token.

actions.name: Bounty Paid
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model and allies within range with a Badge token heal 2.

triggers.name: Inner Peace
triggers.text: This model may declare the Prepare action.
